name: Spiced Gooseberries (Old)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the gooseberries and remove stems.
2. Combine sugar and vinegar in a saucepan.
3. Tie spices (cinnamon and ground cloves) in a bag and add to the syrup mixture.
4. Bring the liquid to a boil, then add the berries.
5. Cook for 20-30 minutes.
6. Pack into hot jars and seal.
